import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims=None):
        super().__init__()
        
        # Visual pathway: 256x1024 -> 512
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(1024, 768),
            nn.LayerNorm(768),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(768, 512),
            nn.LayerNorm(512),
            nn.GELU()
        )
        
        # Text pathway: 77x768 -> 512
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(768, 512),
            nn.LayerNorm(512),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(512, 512),
            nn.LayerNorm(512),
            nn.GELU()
        )
        
        # Cross-attention for multimodal fusion
        self.cross_attn_visual_to_text = nn.MultiheadAttention(embed_dim=512, num_heads=8, dropout=0.1, batch_first=True)
        self.cross_attn_text_to_visual = nn.MultiheadAttention(embed_dim=512, num_heads=8, dropout=0.1, batch_first=True)
        
        # Self-attention for refined fusion
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(embed_dim=512, num_heads=8, dropout=0.1, batch_first=True)
        
        # Feed-forward networks
        self.ffn_visual = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(512, 1024),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(1024, 512)
        )
        self.ffn_text = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(512, 1024),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(1024, 512)
        )
        
        self.norm1_v = nn.LayerNorm(512)
        self.norm2_v = nn.LayerNorm(512)
        self.norm1_t = nn.LayerNorm(512)
        self.norm2_t = nn.LayerNorm(512)
        self.norm_fusion = nn.LayerNorm(512)
        
        # Global pooling and classification
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(512 * 2, 768),
            nn.LayerNorm(768),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
            nn.Linear(768, 512),
            nn.LayerNorm(512),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2)
        )
        
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(512, 256),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
            nn.Linear(256, 13)
        )
        
        self._init_weights()
    
    def _init_weights(self):
        for m in self.modules():
            if isinstance(m, nn.Linear):
                nn.init.xavier_uniform_(m.weight)
                if m.bias is not None:
                    nn.init.zeros_(m.bias)
            elif isinstance(m, nn.LayerNorm):
                nn.init.ones_(m.weight)
                nn.init.zeros_(m.bias)
    
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        """
        Args:
            visual: [B, 256, 1024] - visual features from CLIP-ViT-L-14
            text: [B, 77, 768] - text features from CLIP-text-L
        Returns:
            [B, 13] - classification logits
        """
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Project visual features: [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 256, 512]
        v_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)
        
        # Project text features: [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 77, 512]
        t_feat = self.text_proj(text)
        
        # Cross-modal attention: visual attends to text
        v_attended, _ = self.cross_attn_visual_to_text(
            query=v_feat, key=t_feat, value=t_feat
        )
        v_out = self.norm1_v(v_feat + v_attended)
        v_ffn = self.ffn_visual(v_out)
        v_out = self.norm2_v(v_out + v_ffn)
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text attends to visual
        t_attended, _ = self.cross_attn_text_to_visual(
            query=t_feat, key=v_feat, value=v_feat
        )
        t_out = self.norm1_t(t_feat + t_attended)
        t_ffn = self.ffn_text(t_out)
        t_out = self.norm2_t(t_out + t_ffn)
        
        # Global average pooling
        v_global = v_out.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        t_global = t_out.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Concatenate and fuse
        fused = torch.cat([v_global, t_global], dim=-1)  # [B, 1024]
        fused = self.fusion_mlp(fused)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Classification
        output = self.classifier(fused)  # [B, 13]
        
        return output

import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: 256x1024, Text: 77x768
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        self.num_heads = 8
        
        # Project to common dimension
        self.visual_proj = nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        self.text_proj = nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        
        # Cross-modal attention: visual attends to text
        self.cross_attn_visual = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=self.num_heads,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text attends to visual
        self.cross_attn_text = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=self.num_heads,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Self-attention for fused features
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim * 2,
            num_heads=self.num_heads,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Gating mechanism
        self.gate_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Fusion MLP
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 4, self.hidden_dim * 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim * 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Output head
        self.output_head = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, 256),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(256, 13)
        )
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.shape[0]
        
        # Project inputs
        v_proj = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, hidden]
        t_proj = self.text_proj(text)      # [B, 77, hidden]
        
        # Cross-modal attention: visual queries attend to text keys/values
        v_cross, _ = self.cross_attn_visual(v_proj, t_proj, t_proj)  # [B, 256, hidden]
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text queries attend to visual keys/values  
        t_cross, _ = self.cross_attn_text(t_proj, v_proj, v_proj)    # [B, 77, hidden]
        
        # Pool cross-attended features
        v_pooled = v_cross.mean(dim=1)   # [B, hidden]
        t_pooled = t_cross.mean(dim=1)   # [B, hidden]
        
        # Concatenate pooled features
        concat_feat = torch.cat([v_pooled, t_pooled], dim=-1)  # [B, hidden*2]
        
        # Gating mechanism
        gate = self.gate_proj(concat_feat)  # [B, hidden]
        
        # Apply gate to visual and text features separately then combine
        v_gated = v_pooled * gate
        t_gated = t_pooled * (1 - gate)
        gated_fusion = v_gated + t_gated  # [B, hidden]
        
        # Prepare for self-attention: stack features
        stacked = torch.stack([v_pooled, t_pooled, gated_fusion], dim=1)  # [B, 3, hidden]
        # Expand to match concatenated dimension
        stacked_expanded = torch.cat([
            stacked[:, 0:1].expand(-1, 2, -1).reshape(B, 2, self.hidden_dim),
            stacked[:, 1:2].expand(-1, 2, -1).reshape(B, 2, self.hidden_dim)
        ], dim=-1)  # Simplified: use direct concatenation instead
        
        # Alternative: use concatenated features with MLP fusion
        combined = torch.cat([
            v_pooled, t_pooled, 
            v_pooled * t_pooled,  # element-wise product
            torch.abs(v_pooled - t_pooled)  # difference
        ], dim=-1)  # [B, hidden*4]
        
        # Fusion MLP
        fused = self.fusion_mlp(combined)  # [B, hidden]
        
        # Final output
        output = self.output_head(fused)  # [B, 13]
        
        return output

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024], Text: [B, 77, 768]
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text queries attend to visual keys/values
        self.text_to_visual_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.text_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            kdim=self.visual_dim,
            vdim=self.visual_dim,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Visual pooling and projection
        self.visual_pool = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Text pooling and projection  
        self.text_pool = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Gated fusion
        self.gate = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Fusion MLP with residual
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim * 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim * 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
        )
        
        # Output head
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim // 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim // 2, 13)
        )
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.shape[0]
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text attends to visual
        attn_out, _ = self.text_to_visual_attn(
            query=text,      # [B, 77, 768]
            key=visual,      # [B, 256, 1024]
            value=visual     # [B, 256, 1024]
        )  # [B, 77, 768]
        
        # Pool visual features (mean pooling)
        visual_pooled = visual.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 1024]
        visual_feat = self.visual_pool(visual_pooled)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Pool attended text features (mean pooling)
        text_pooled = attn_out.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 768]
        text_feat = self.text_pool(text_pooled)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Concatenate for gating
        combined = torch.cat([visual_feat, text_feat], dim=-1)  # [B, 1024]
        
        # Learned gate
        gate = self.gate(combined)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Gated fusion
        fused = gate * visual_feat + (1 - gate) * text_feat  # [B, 512]
        
        # Residual MLP
        fused = fused + self.fusion_mlp(fused)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Classify
        output = self.classifier(fused)  # [B, 13]
        
        return output

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024], Text: [B, 77, 768]
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        self.output_dim = 13
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text queries attend to visual keys/values
        self.text_to_visual_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.text_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            kdim=self.visual_dim,
            vdim=self.visual_dim,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Visual pooling and projection
        self.visual_pool = nn.AdaptiveAvgPool1d(1)
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Text pooling and projection  
        self.text_pool = nn.AdaptiveAvgPool1d(1)
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Gated fusion
        self.gate = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Output classifier with residual connections
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim // 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim // 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim // 2, self.output_dim)
        )
        
        # Skip connection projection
        self.skip_proj = nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim)
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        # visual: [B, 256, 1024], text: [B, 77, 768]
        B = visual.shape[0]
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text attends to visual
        # text as query, visual as key/value
        attended_text, _ = self.text_to_visual_attn(
            query=text,      # [B, 77, 768]
            key=visual,      # [B, 256, 1024] 
            value=visual     # [B, 256, 1024]
        )  # -> [B, 77, 768]
        
        # Pool visual features [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 1024]
        visual_pooled = self.visual_pool(visual.transpose(1, 2)).squeeze(-1)  # [B, 1024]
        
        # Pool attended text features [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 768]
        text_pooled = self.text_pool(attended_text.transpose(1, 2)).squeeze(-1)  # [B, 768]
        
        # Project to common space
        visual_feat = self.visual_proj(visual_pooled)  # [B, 512]
        text_feat = self.text_proj(text_pooled)        # [B, 512]
        
        # Concatenate for gating
        combined = torch.cat([visual_feat, text_feat], dim=-1)  # [B, 1024]
        
        # Learnable gate
        gate_weight = self.gate(combined)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Gated fusion
        fused = gate_weight * visual_feat + (1 - gate_weight) * text_feat  # [B, 512]
        
        # Residual from concatenated features
        skip = self.skip_proj(combined)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Final fusion with residual
        output = self.fusion_mlp(fused + skip)  # [B, 13]
        
        return output

import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: 256x1024, Text: 77x768
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        self.fused_dim = 768
        
        # Project visual features to sequence of tokens
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Project text features
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention: visual attends to text
        self.cross_attn_v2t = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim, 
            num_heads=8, 
            batch_first=True,
            dropout=0.1
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text attends to visual
        self.cross_attn_t2v = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True,
            dropout=0.1
        )
        
        # Self-attention for fused representation
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True,
            dropout=0.1
        )
        
        # Gating mechanism for feature fusion
        self.gate_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Final projection layers
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, self.fused_dim // 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim // 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
        )
        
        # Output head for 13 classes
        self.output_head = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim // 2, 256),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(256, 13)
        )
        
        # Layer norms
        self.norm1 = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        self.norm2 = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        self.norm3 = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.shape[0]
        
        # visual: [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 256, hidden_dim]
        v_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, 512]
        
        # text: [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        t_feat = self.text_proj(text)  # [B, 77, 512]
        
        # Cross-attention: visual queries attend to text keys/values
        v_attended, _ = self.cross_attn_v2t(
            query=v_feat,
            key=t_feat,
            value=t_feat
        )  # [B, 256, 512]
        v_attended = self.norm1(v_feat + v_attended)
        
        # Cross-attention: text queries attend to visual keys/values
        t_attended, _ = self.cross_attn_t2v(
            query=t_feat,
            key=v_feat,
            value=v_feat
        )  # [B, 77, 512]
        t_attended = self.norm2(t_feat + t_attended)
        
        # Global pooling with attention weights
        v_pooled = v_attended.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        t_pooled = t_attended.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Gated fusion
        gate_input = torch.cat([v_pooled, t_pooled], dim=-1)  # [B, 1024]
        gate = self.gate_proj(gate_input)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Apply gating
        fused = gate * v_pooled + (1 - gate) * t_pooled  # [B, 512]
        fused = self.norm3(fused)
        
        # Add residual connection and process through MLP
        fused = self.fusion_mlp(fused)  # [B, 384]
        
        # Output prediction
        output = self.output_head(fused)  # [B, 13]
        
        return output

import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024], Text: [B, 77, 768]
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        
        # Project to common dimension
        self.visual_proj = nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        self.text_proj = nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text attends to visual
        self.cross_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Self-attention for refined fusion
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Gating mechanism for feature-wise modulation
        self.gate_visual = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        self.gate_text = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Fusion MLP
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 3, 512),
            nn.LayerNorm(512),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(512, 256),
            nn.LayerNorm(256),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(256, 13)
        )
        
        # Layer norms
        self.ln_visual = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        self.ln_text = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        self.ln_fused = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        # visual: [B, 256, 1024], text: [B, 77, 768]
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Project to common space
        v_proj = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, 512]
        t_proj = self.text_proj(text)       # [B, 77, 512]
        
        v_proj = self.ln_visual(v_proj)
        t_proj = self.ln_text(t_proj)
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text queries attend to visual keys/values
        t_cross, _ = self.cross_attn(
            query=t_proj,
            key=v_proj,
            value=v_proj
        )  # [B, 77, 512]
        
        # Self-attention on cross-modal features
        t_refined, _ = self.self_attn(t_cross, t_cross, t_cross)  # [B, 77, 512]
        t_refined = self.ln_fused(t_refined + t_cross)
        
        # Global pooling with attention weights
        t_pooled = t_refined.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        v_pooled = v_proj.mean(dim=1)      # [B, 512]
        
        # Concatenate pooled features for gating
        concat_for_gate = torch.cat([v_pooled, t_pooled], dim=-1)  # [B, 1024]
        
        # Gating mechanisms
        v_gate = self.gate_visual(concat_for_gate)  # [B, 512]
        t_gate = self.gate_text(concat_for_gate)    # [B, 512]
        
        # Apply gates
        v_gated = v_pooled * v_gate  # [B, 512]
        t_gated = t_pooled * t_gate  # [B, 512]
        
        # Element-wise interaction
        interaction = v_gated * t_gated  # [B, 512]
        
        # Final fusion representation
        fused = torch.cat([v_gated, t_gated, interaction], dim=-1)  # [B, 1536]
        
        # Output projection
        output = self.fusion_mlp(fused)  # [B, 13]
        
        return output

        )

        )

            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,

        )

            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True,
            dropout=0.1
        )
        
        # Fusion MLP with correct input dimension
        fusion_input_dim = self.hidden_dim * 4  # v_pooled + t_pooled + v_cross + t_cross
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(fusion_input_dim, self.hidden_dim * 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim * 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1)
        )
        
        # Output head
        self.output_head = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, 128),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(128, 13)
        )
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.shape[0]
        
        # Project visual features: [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 256, 512]
        v_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)
        
        # Project text features: [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 77, 512]
        t_feat = self.text_proj(text)
        
        # Global pooling for compact representations
        v_pooled = v_feat.mean(dim=1, keepdim=True)  # [B, 1, 512]
        t_pooled = t_feat.mean(dim=1, keepdim=True)  # [B, 1, 512]
        
        # Cross-modal attention: visual queries attend to text
        v_cross, _ = self.cross_attn_visual_to_text(

            value=t_feat
        )  # [B, 1, 512]

        )  # [B, 1, 512]
        
        # Concatenate all features for fusion

        v_pooled_flat = v_pooled.squeeze(1)

        v_cross_flat = v_cross.squeeze(1)
        t_cross_flat = t_cross.squeeze(1)
        
        # Combine: [B, 512 * 4] = [B, 2048]
        combined = torch.cat([v_pooled_flat, t_pooled_flat, v_cross_flat, t_cross_flat], dim=-1)
        
        # Fusion MLP
        fused = self.fusion_mlp(combined)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Output
        output = self.output_head(fused)  # [B, 13]
        
        return output

            nn.GELU(),

        )

            nn.Dropout(0.1),

        )

        attn_out = self.norm2(self_out + attn_out)
        
        # Global average pooling over sequence
        cross_feat = attn_out.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Also get pooled visual and text separately
        visual_global = visual.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 1024]
        visual_global = self.visual_proj(visual_global)  # [B, 512]
        
        text_global = text.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 768]
        text_global = self.text_proj(text_global)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Gated fusion
        concat_for_gate = torch.cat([visual_global, text_global], dim=-1)  # [B, 1024]
        gate_v = self.gate_visual(concat_for_gate)  # [B, 512]
        gate_t = self.gate_text(concat_for_gate)  # [B, 512]
        
        gated_visual = visual_global * gate_v
        gated_text = text_global * gate_t
        
        # Combine all features
        combined = torch.cat([
            gated_visual, 
            gated_text, 
            cross_feat
        ], dim=-1)  # [B, 1536]
        
        # Fusion and output
        fused = self.fusion_mlp(combined)  # [B, 512]
        output = self.output_head(fused)  # [B, 13]
        
        return output

            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(256, 13)

        self.ln_t = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)

        v_feat = self.ln_v(v_feat)
        t_feat = self.ln_t(t_feat)

        )  # [B, 77, 512]

        fused = self.ln_fused(fused)

        fused = fused + 0.3 * v_pooled
        
        # Classify

import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: 256x1024, Text: 77x768
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        self.num_heads = 8
        
        # Project to common dimension
        self.visual_proj = nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        self.text_proj = nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        
        # Cross-modal attention: visual attends to text
        self.cross_attn_v2t = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=self.num_heads,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text attends to visual
        self.cross_attn_t2v = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=self.num_heads,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Self-attention for each modality after cross-attention
        self.self_attn_visual = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=self.num_heads,
            batch_first=True
        )
        self.self_attn_text = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=self.num_heads,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Gating mechanism
        self.gate_visual = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        self.gate_text = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Feed-forward networks
        self.ffn_visual = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim * 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim)
        )
        self.ffn_text = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim * 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim)
        )
        
        # Layer norms
        self.ln_v1 = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        self.ln_v2 = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        self.ln_v3 = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        self.ln_t1 = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        self.ln_t2 = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        self.ln_t3 = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        
        # Final fusion and classification
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim // 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim // 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
        )
        
        self.classifier = nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim // 2, 13)
        
        # Modality importance predictor
        self.modality_weight = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, 64),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Linear(64, 2),
            nn.Softmax(dim=-1)
        )
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Project inputs
        v = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, 512]
        t = self.text_proj(text)      # [B, 77, 512]
        
        # Cross-modal attention: visual -> text
        v_cross, _ = self.cross_attn_v2t(v, t, t)  # [B, 256, 512]
        v_cross = self.ln_v1(v + v_cross)
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text -> visual  
        t_cross, _ = self.cross_attn_t2v(t, v, v)  # [B, 77, 512]
        t_cross = self.ln_t1(t + t_cross)
        
        # Self-attention
        v_self, _ = self.self_attn_visual(v_cross, v_cross, v_cross)
        v_self = self.ln_v2(v_cross + v_self)
        
        t_self, _ = self.self_attn_text(t_cross, t_cross, t_cross)
        t_self = self.ln_t2(t_cross + t_self)
        
        # FFN
        v_ffn = self.ffn_visual(v_self)
        v_out = self.ln_v3(v_self + v_ffn)
        
        t_ffn = self.ffn_text(t_self)
        t_out = self.ln_t3(t_self + t_ffn)
        
        # Global pooling with attention weights
        v_pooled = v_out.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        t_pooled = t_out.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Compute modality importance
        concat_feat = torch.cat([v_pooled, t_pooled], dim=-1)
        mod_weights = self.modality_weight(concat_feat)  # [B, 2]
        
        # Weighted combination
        v_weighted = v_pooled * mod_weights[:, 0:1]
        t_weighted = t_pooled * mod_weights[:, 1:2]
        
        # Gating
        gate_input = torch.cat([v_weighted, t_weighted], dim=-1)
        v_gate = self.gate_visual(gate_input)
        t_gate = self.gate_text(gate_input)
        
        v_gated = v_weighted * v_gate
        t_gated = t_weighted * t_gate
        
        # Final fusion
        fused = torch.cat([v_gated, t_gated], dim=-1)
        fused = self.fusion_mlp(fused)
        
        # Output
        output = self.classifier(fused)
        
        return output

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):

        self.visual_seq_len = 256

        self.text_seq_len = 77
        self.text_dim = 768
        
        # Project to common dimension
        self.common_dim = 512
        
        # Visual projection (spatial pooling + projection)
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.common_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Text projection
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.common_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text queries visual
        self.cross_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.common_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True,
            dropout=0.1
        )
        
        # Self-attention for refined fusion
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.common_dim * 2,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True,
            dropout=0.1
        )
        
        # Gating mechanism for feature-wise modulation
        self.gate_visual = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim, self.common_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        self.gate_text = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim, self.common_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Fusion MLP
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim * 4, self.common_dim * 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim * 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim * 2, self.common_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
        )
        
        # Output classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim, 256),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(256, 13)
        )
        
        # Learnable query tokens for aggregation
        self.query_tokens = nn.Parameter(torch.randn(1, 4, self.common_dim))
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.shape[0]
        
        # Project visual features: [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 256, 512]
        v_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)
        
        # Project text features: [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 77, 512]
        t_feat = self.text_proj(text)
        
        # Pool visual to single representation using attention
        v_pooled = v_feat.mean(dim=1, keepdim=True)  # [B, 1, 512]
        t_pooled = t_feat.mean(dim=1, keepdim=True)  # [B, 1, 512]
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text attends to visual
        # Use pooled text as query, full visual as key/value
        t_query = t_pooled.expand(-1, self.text_seq_len, -1)  # [B, 77, 512]
        cross_out, _ = self.cross_attn(t_query, v_feat, v_feat)  # [B, 77, 512]
        cross_pooled = cross_out.mean(dim=1, keepdim=True)  # [B, 1, 512]
        
        # Gating: modulate features based on each other
        v_gate = self.gate_visual(cross_pooled.squeeze(1)).unsqueeze(1)  # [B, 1, 512]
        t_gate = self.gate_text(v_pooled.squeeze(1)).unsqueeze(1)  # [B, 1, 512]
        
        v_gated = v_pooled * v_gate  # [B, 1, 512]
        t_gated = t_pooled * t_gate  # [B, 1, 512]
        
        # Concatenate multiple representations
        # [B, 1, 512] each -> concatenate -> [B, 1, 2048]
        fused = torch.cat([
            v_pooled, t_pooled,
            v_gated, t_gated,
        ], dim=-1)  # [B, 1, 2048]
        
        # Expand to sequence for self-attention with learnable queries
        queries = self.query_tokens.expand(B, -1, -1)  # [B, 4, 512]
        
        # Combine with fused info
        fused_expanded = self.fusion_mlp(fused).expand(-1, 4, -1)  # [B, 4, 512]
        combined = queries + fused_expanded  # [B, 4, 512]
        
        # Final aggregation
        out = combined.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Classify
        logits = self.classifier(out)  # [B, 13]
        
        return logits

        )

            nn.Linear(256, 13)
        )

        out = self.fusion_mlp(fused)  # [B, 256]

        )

            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim * 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim * 2, self.common_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Output classifier

            nn.Linear(self.common_dim, 256),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.3),
            nn.Linear(256, 13)
        )

        self.norm1 = nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim)
        self.norm2 = nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim)
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.shape[0]
        
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024] -> pool spatially first
        visual_pooled = visual.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 1024]
        visual_feat = self.visual_proj(visual_pooled)  # [B, 512]

        # Mean pooled features
        fused_mean = attn_out.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Concatenate multiple views
        fused_cat = torch.cat([fused_global, fused_max, fused_mean], dim=-1)  # [B, 1536]
        
        # Final fusion
        output = self.fusion_mlp(fused_cat)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Classify
        logits = self.classifier(output)  # [B, 13]
        
        return logits

            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(256, 13)
        )
        
        # Learnable query tokens for aggregation
        self.num_queries = 4
        self.query_tokens = nn.Parameter(torch.randn(1, self.num_queries, self.common_dim))
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)

        v_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)

        # Cross-attention: text attends to visual (text as query, visual as key/value)

            query=queries,

        )  # [B, 4, 512]
        
        # Global average pooling over queries
        out = aggregated.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Classify
        logits = self.classifier(out)  # [B, 13]

        )

            dropout=0.1
        )

            batch_first=True,
            dropout=0.1
        )
        
        # Gating mechanism for feature fusion
        self.gate_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim * 2, self.common_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Fusion MLP
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim * 2, self.common_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim),

            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim // 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
        )
        
        # Output classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim // 2, 256),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(256, 13)
        )

        v_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)
        
        # Project text features: [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 77, 512]
        t_feat = self.text_proj(text)
        
        # Cross-modal attention: visual queries attend to text keys/values
        v_attended, _ = self.cross_attn_v2t(
            query=v_feat,
            key=t_feat,
            value=t_feat,
            need_weights=False
        )  # [B, 256, 512]
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text queries attend to visual keys/values
        t_attended, _ = self.cross_attn_t2v(
            query=t_feat,
            key=v_feat,

        )  # [B, 77, 512]

        # Apply gated fusion

        fused_out = fused_attn.squeeze(1) + fused  # Residual connection

        mlp_out = self.fusion_mlp(fused_out)
        output = self.classifier(mlp_out)
        
        return output

        t_fused, _ = self.cross_attn(
            query=t_feat_gated,
            key=v_feat_gated,
            value=v_feat_gated
        )  # [B, 77, 512]
        
        # Concatenate and pool
        combined = torch.cat([t_fused, t_feat_gated], dim=1)  # [B, 154, 512]
        
        # Self-attention
        fused_attn, _ = self.self_attn(combined, combined, combined)
        
        # Multi-scale pooling
        pooled_mean = fused_attn.mean(dim=1)      # [B, 512]
        pooled_max = fused_attn.max(dim=1)[0]     # [B, 512]
        pooled_first = fused_attn[:, 0, :]        # [B, 512]
        
        # Final fusion
        fused = torch.cat([pooled_mean, pooled_max, pooled_first], dim=-1)
        fused = self.fusion_mlp(fused)
        
        # Residual connection with gated global
        residual = v_gate * v_global + t_gate * t_global
        fused = fused + residual
        
        # Output
        output = self.output_head(fused)  # [B, 13]
        
        return output

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):

        )
        
        # Gating mechanism
        self.gate_visual = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        self.gate_text = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Fusion MLP
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Output classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, 256),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(256, 13)
        )
        
        # Layer norms
        self.ln_v = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        self.ln_t = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        self.ln_fused = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Project inputs
        v_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, 512]
        t_feat = self.text_proj(text)       # [B, 77, 512]
        
        v_feat = self.ln_v(v_feat)
        t_feat = self.ln_t(t_feat)
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text attends to visual
        attn_out, _ = self.cross_attn(
            query=t_feat,
            key=v_feat,
            value=v_feat
        )  # [B, 77, 512]
        
        # Self-attention on attended features
        attn_out, _ = self.self_attn(attn_out, attn_out, attn_out)
        
        # Pool both modalities
        v_pooled = v_feat.mean(dim=1)      # [B, 512]
        t_pooled = attn_out.mean(dim=1)     # [B, 512]
        
        # Gating
        v_gate = self.gate_visual(v_pooled)
        t_gate = self.gate_text(t_pooled)
        
        v_gated = v_pooled * v_gate
        t_gated = t_pooled * t_gate
        
        # Concatenate and fuse
        fused = torch.cat([v_gated, t_gated], dim=-1)  # [B, 1024]
        fused = self.fusion_mlp(fused)  # [B, 512]
        fused = self.ln_fused(fused)
        
        # Residual connection with pooled features
        fused = fused + 0.5 * (v_pooled + t_pooled)
        
        # Classify
        output = self.classifier(fused)  # [B, 13]
        
        return output

        )

        self.gate_bias = nn.Parameter(torch.zeros(1))

            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Output classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim // 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim // 2, self.output_dim)
        )
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Process visual: [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 256, hidden]
        visual_tokens = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, H]
        
        # Process text: [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 77, hidden]
        text_tokens = self.text_proj(text)  # [B, 77, H]
        
        # Cross-attention: text attends to visual
        # Use mean-pooled text as query for all positions
        text_query = text_tokens.mean(dim=1, keepdim=True)  # [B, 1, H]
        cross_out, _ = self.cross_attn(
            query=text_query.expand(-1, visual_tokens.size(1), -1),
            key=visual_tokens,
            value=visual_tokens
        )  # [B, 256, H]
        
        # Pool visual features
        visual_pooled = cross_out.mean(dim=1)  # [B, H]
        visual_max = cross_out.max(dim=1)[0]   # [B, H]

        text_max = text_tokens.max(dim=1)[0]   # [B, H]
        
        # Learned gating
        gate_v = torch.sigmoid(self.gate_visual(visual_pooled))
        gate_t = torch.sigmoid(self.gate_text(text_pooled))
        
        # Gated fusion
        gated_visual = visual_pooled * gate_v
        gated_text = text_pooled * gate_t
        
        # Concatenate multiple representations
        fused = torch.cat([
            gated_visual, 
            gated_text,
            visual_pooled * text_pooled,  # element-wise interaction
            torch.abs(visual_pooled - text_pooled)  # difference
        ], dim=-1)  # [B, H*4]
        
        # Final processing
        out = self.fusion_mlp(fused)  # [B, H]
        logits = self.classifier(out)  # [B, 13]
        
        return logits

        )
        
        # Gating mechanism for feature fusion
        self.gate_visual = nn.Sequential(

            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        self.gate_text = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim * 2, self.common_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Fusion MLP
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim * 3, 1024),
            nn.LayerNorm(1024),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
            nn.Linear(1024, 512),
            nn.LayerNorm(512),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
            nn.Linear(512, 256),
            nn.LayerNorm(256),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Output classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(256, 128),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(128, 13)
        )
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.shape[0]
        
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024] -> pool spatially first
        # Global average pooling over sequence
        visual_pooled = visual.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 1024]
        visual_feat = self.visual_proj(visual_pooled)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Also keep full sequence for cross-attention
        visual_seq = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, 512]
        
        # Text: [B, 77, 768]
        text_seq = self.text_proj(text)  # [B, 77, 512]

        text_query = text_seq.mean(dim=1, keepdim=True)  # [B, 1, 512]
        cross_out, _ = self.cross_attn(
            query=text_query,
            key=visual_seq,
            value=visual_seq
        )  # [B, 1, 512]
        cross_feat = cross_out.squeeze(1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Pool text with self-attention
        text_pooled = text_seq.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Concatenate for gating
        combined = torch.cat([visual_feat, text_pooled], dim=-1)  # [B, 1024]
        
        # Learnable gates
        gate_v = self.gate_visual(combined)  # [B, 512]
        gate_t = self.gate_text(combined)    # [B, 512]
        
        # Apply gates
        visual_gated = visual_feat * gate_v   # [B, 512]
        text_gated = text_pooled * gate_t     # [B, 512]
        
        # Final fusion features
        fused = torch.cat([
            visual_gated + text_gated,  # additive fusion
            cross_feat,                  # cross-modal interaction
            visual_gated * text_gated   # multiplicative interaction
        ], dim=-1)  # [B, 1536]
        
        # Process through MLP
        hidden = self.fusion_mlp(fused)  # [B, 256]
        
        # Classify
        output = self.classifier(hidden)  # [B, 13]
        
        return output

        )

            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
            nn.Linear(256, 13)

        t_feat = self.text_proj(text)      # [B, 77, 512]
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text attends to visual
        t_enhanced, _ = self.cross_attn(
            query=t_feat,
            key=v_feat,
            value=v_feat
        )  # [B, 77, 512]
        
        # Self-attention on enhanced text

        fusion_input = torch.cat([v_pooled, t_pooled, v_gated], dim=-1)
        
        # Fusion processing
        fused = self.fusion_mlp(fusion_input)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Residual connection and final prediction
        output = self.classifier(fused + v_gated)  # [B, 13]
        
        return output

        )

        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,

            batch_first=True,

        )
        
        # Gating mechanism for feature fusion
        self.gate_visual = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim // 4),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim // 4, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        self.gate_text = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim // 4),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim // 4, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Fusion MLP
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim // 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim // 2),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
        )
        
        # Output classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim // 2, 256),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.3),
            nn.Linear(256, 13)
        )
        
        self.layer_norm1 = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        self.layer_norm2 = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Process visual: [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 16, hidden_dim]
        # First pool the spatial dimension
        visual_transposed = visual.transpose(1, 2)  # [B, 1024, 256]
        visual_pooled = self.visual_pool(visual_transposed)  # [B, 1024, 16]
        visual_pooled = visual_pooled.transpose(1, 2)  # [B, 16, 1024]
        visual_feat = self.visual_proj(visual_pooled)  # [B, 16, hidden_dim]

        # Cross-modal attention: text attends to visual
        attn_out, _ = self.cross_attn(
            query=text_feat,
            key=visual_feat,
            value=visual_feat
        )  # [B, 77, hidden_dim]
        attn_out = self.layer_norm1(attn_out + text_feat)
        
        # Self-attention on attended features
        self_attn_out, _ = self.self_attn(attn_out, attn_out, attn_out)
        text_fused = self.layer_norm2(self_attn_out + attn_out)
        
        # Global average pooling over sequence
        text_global = text_fused.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Also pool visual features
        visual_global = visual_feat.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden_dim]
        
        # Gated fusion
        gate_v = self.gate_visual(visual_global)
        gate_t = self.gate_text(text_global)

        # Concatenate and fuse
        combined = torch.cat([visual_gated, text_gated], dim=-1)  # [B, hidden_dim*2]
        fused = self.fusion_mlp(combined)  # [B, hidden_dim//2]
        
        # Final classification
        output = self.classifier(fused)  # [B, 13]
        
        return output

        gated_fusion = gate * v_part + (1 - gate) * t_part  # [B, 512]
        
        # Combine with original concatenation
        fused_final = torch.cat([gated_fusion, v_part + t_part], dim=-1)  # [B, 1024]
        
        # Fusion MLP
        out = self.fusion_mlp(fused_final)  # [B, 256]
        
        # Output head
        out = self.output_head(out)  # [B, 13]
        
        return out

        )

        )
        self.cross_attn_text = nn.MultiheadAttention(

        )

        )

        self.gate_net = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim * 2, self.common_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Fusion MLP
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim * self.num_queries, 2048),
            nn.LayerNorm(2048),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(2048, 1024),
            nn.LayerNorm(1024),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(1024, 512),
            nn.LayerNorm(512),
            nn.GELU(),
        )

        self.output_head = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(512, 256),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Linear(256, 13)
        )
        
        # Layer norms

        self.norm_t = nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim)
        self.norm_fused = nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim)
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Project visual features: [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 256, 512]
        v_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)
        
        # Project text features: [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 77, 512]
        t_feat = self.text_proj(text)

        # Cross-attention: queries attend to visual
        v_attended, _ = self.cross_attn_visual(
            queries, v_feat, v_feat
        )
        v_attended = self.norm_v(v_attended)
        
        # Cross-attention: queries attend to text
        t_attended, _ = self.cross_attn_text(
            queries, t_feat, t_feat
        )
        t_attended = self.norm_t(t_attended)
        
        # Compute gating weights based on both modalities
        gate_input = torch.cat([
            v_attended.mean(dim=1),  # [B, 512]
            t_attended.mean(dim=1)   # [B, 512]
        ], dim=-1)  # [B, 1024]
        
        gate_weights = self.gate_net(gate_input)  # [B, 512]
        gate_weights = gate_weights.unsqueeze(1).expand(-1, self.num_queries, -1)  # [B, 32, 512]
        
        # Gated fusion
        fused = gate_weights * v_attended + (1 - gate_weights) * t_attended
        
        # Self-attention for refinement
        fused, _ = self.self_attn(fused, fused, fused)
        fused = self.norm_fused(fused)
        
        # Flatten and process
        fused_flat = fused.reshape(B, -1)  # [B, 32*512=16384]
        
        # Final MLP processing
        out = self.fusion_mlp(fused_flat)
        out = self.output_head(out)
        
        return out

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):

        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        self.output_dim = 13
        
        # Visual projection with spatial pooling
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Text projection (CLS token weighted)
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text queries visual
        self.cross_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True,
            dropout=0.1
        )
        
        # Self-attention for fused representation
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim * 2,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True,
            dropout=0.1
        )
        
        # Gating mechanism
        self.gate_visual = nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        self.gate_text = nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        self.gate_bias = nn.Parameter(torch.zeros(1))
        
        # Fusion MLP
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 4, self.hidden_dim * 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim * 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Output head
        self.output_head = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim // 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim // 2, self.output_dim)
        )
        
        # Learnable query tokens for aggregation
        self.num_queries = 4
        self.query_tokens = nn.Parameter(torch.randn(1, self.num_queries, self.hidden_dim * 2))
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Process visual: [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 256, hidden]
        visual_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, hidden]
        
        # Process text: [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 77, hidden]
        text_feat = self.text_proj(text)  # [B, 77, hidden]
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text attends to visual
        # Use mean-pooled text as query
        text_query = text_feat.mean(dim=1, keepdim=True)  # [B, 1, hidden]
        cross_out, _ = self.cross_attn(
            query=text_query,
            key=visual_feat,
            value=visual_feat
        )  # [B, 1, hidden]
        cross_out = cross_out.squeeze(1)  # [B, hidden]
        
        # Global pooling
        visual_pooled = visual_feat.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden]
        text_pooled = text_feat.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden]
        
        # Gating mechanism
        gate_v = torch.sigmoid(self.gate_visual(visual_pooled))
        gate_t = torch.sigmoid(self.gate_text(text_pooled))
        gate_weight = torch.sigmoid(self.gate_bias)
        
        gated_visual = gate_v * visual_pooled
        gated_text = gate_t * text_pooled
        
        # Concatenate multiple representations
        concat_feat = torch.cat([
            gated_visual,
            gated_text,
            cross_out,
            visual_pooled * text_pooled  # element-wise interaction
        ], dim=-1)  # [B, hidden*4]
        
        # Fusion
        fused = self.fusion_mlp(concat_feat)  # [B, hidden]
        
        # Expand and attend with learnable queries
        expanded = torch.cat([fused, cross_out], dim=-1).unsqueeze(1).expand(-1, self.num_queries, -1)  # [B, num_queries, hidden*2]
        
        # Add query tokens
        queries = self.query_tokens.expand(B, -1, -1)  # [B, num_queries, hidden*2]
        combined = queries + expanded  # residual connection
        
        # Self-attention aggregation
        attn_out, _ = self.self_attn(combined, combined, combined)  # [B, num_queries, hidden*2]
        
        # Pool across queries
        final_feat = attn_out.mean(dim=1)[:, :self.hidden_dim]  # [B, hidden]
        
        # Residual connection with original fusion
        final_feat = final_feat + fused
        
        # Output
        output = self.output_head(final_feat)  # [B, 13]
        
        return output

import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: 256x1024, Text: 77x768
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        self.num_heads = 8
        
        # Project to common dimension
        self.visual_proj = nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        self.text_proj = nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        
        # Cross-modal attention: visual attends to text
        self.cross_attn_v2t = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=self.num_heads,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text attends to visual
        self.cross_attn_t2v = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=self.num_heads,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Self-attention for each modality after cross-attention
        self.self_attn_visual = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=self.num_heads,
            batch_first=True
        )
        self.self_attn_text = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=self.num_heads,
            batch_first=True
        )
        
        # Gating mechanism
        self.gate_visual = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        self.gate_text = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Layer norms
        self.norm1_v = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        self.norm1_t = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        self.norm2_v = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        self.norm2_t = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        
        # FFNs
        self.ffn_v = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim * 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim)
        )
        self.ffn_t = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim * 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim)
        )
        
        # Global pooling and fusion
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 4, self.hidden_dim * 2),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim * 2),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, 13)
        )
        
        self.dropout = nn.Dropout(0.1)
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        # visual: [B, 256, 1024], text: [B, 77, 768]
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Project to common space
        v = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, 512]
        t = self.text_proj(text)      # [B, 77, 512]
        
        # Cross-modal attention: visual queries attend to text keys/values
        v_cross, _ = self.cross_attn_v2t(v, t, t)  # [B, 256, 512]
        v_cross = self.norm1_v(v + self.dropout(v_cross))
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text queries attend to visual keys/values
        t_cross, _ = self.cross_attn_t2v(t, v, v)  # [B, 77, 512]
        t_cross = self.norm1_t(t + self.dropout(t_cross))
        
        # Gating: combine original and cross-attended features
        v_gate_input = torch.cat([v, v_cross], dim=-1)  # [B, 256, 1024]
        t_gate_input = torch.cat([t, t_cross], dim=-1)  # [B, 77, 1024]
        
        v_gate = self.gate_visual(v_gate_input.mean(dim=1, keepdim=True))  # [B, 1, 512]
        t_gate = self.gate_text(t_gate_input.mean(dim=1, keepdim=True))   # [B, 1, 512]
        
        v_gated = v_gate * v_cross + (1 - v_gate) * v  # [B, 256, 512]
        t_gated = t_gate * t_cross + (1 - t_gate) * t  # [B, 77, 512]
        
        # Self-attention on gated features
        v_self, _ = self.self_attn_visual(v_gated, v_gated, v_gated)
        v_self = self.norm2_v(v_gated + self.dropout(v_self))
        
        t_self, _ = self.self_attn_text(t_gated, t_gated, t_gated)
        t_self = self.norm2_t(t_gated + self.dropout(t_self))
        
        # FFN
        v_out = v_self + self.ffn_v(v_self)
        t_out = t_self + self.ffn_t(t_self)
        
        # Global pooling strategies
        # Mean pooling
        v_mean = v_out.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        t_mean = t_out.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Max pooling
        v_max, _ = v_out.max(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        t_max, _ = t_out.max(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Concatenate all pooled features
        fused = torch.cat([v_mean, v_max, t_mean, t_max], dim=-1)  # [B, 2048]
        
        # Final prediction
        output = self.fusion_mlp(fused)  # [B, 13]
        
        return output

            nn.LayerNorm(512),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
        )
        
        # Output head
        self.output_head = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(512, 256),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Linear(256, 13)
        )
        
        # Layer norms
        self.norm1 = nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim)
        self.norm2 = nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim)
        self.norm3 = nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim)
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # Project inputs
        # visual: [B, 256, 1024] -> [B, 256, 512]
        v_feat = self.visual_proj(visual)
        # text: [B, 77, 768] -> [B, 77, 512]
        t_feat = self.text_proj(text)
        
        # Expand queries
        queries = self.query_embed.expand(B, -1, -1)  # [B, 32, 512]
        
        # Cross-attention: queries attend to visual
        v_attended, _ = self.cross_attn_visual(
            queries, v_feat, v_feat
        )  # [B, 32, 512]
        v_attended = self.norm1(v_attended + queries)
        
        # Cross-attention: queries attend to text
        t_attended, _ = self.cross_attn_text(
            queries, t_feat, t_feat
        )  # [B, 32, 512]
        t_attended = self.norm2(t_attended + queries)
        
        # Compute gating weights based on pooled features
        v_pooled = v_feat.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        t_pooled = t_feat.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        gate_input = torch.cat([v_pooled, t_pooled], dim=-1)  # [B, 1024]
        gate = self.gate_proj(gate_input).unsqueeze(1)  # [B, 1, 512]
        
        # Gated fusion of attended features
        fused = gate * v_attended + (1 - gate) * t_attended  # [B, 32, 512]
        
        # Self-attention for refinement
        fused, _ = self.self_attn(fused, fused, fused)
        fused = self.norm3(fused + v_attended + t_attended)
        
        # Flatten and process
        fused_flat = fused.view(B, -1)  # [B, 32*512=16384]
        fused_out = self.fusion_mlp(fused_flat)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Final output
        output = self.output_head(fused_out)  # [B, 13]
        
        return output

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dims):
        super().__init__()
        # Visual: 256x1024, Text: 77x768
        self.visual_dim = 1024
        self.text_dim = 768
        self.hidden_dim = 512
        self.fused_dim = 768
        
        # Project visual to sequence of tokens matching text length
        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.visual_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        )
        
        # Project text to common space
        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.hidden_dim)
        )
        
        # Spatial pooling for visual (from 256 tokens)
        self.visual_pool = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(256, 77),  # Reshape to match text length
            nn.LayerNorm(77),
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention: visual attends to text
        self.cross_attn_v2t = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim, 
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True,
            dropout=0.1
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text attends to visual  
        self.cross_attn_t2v = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim,
            num_heads=8, 
            batch_first=True,
            dropout=0.1
        )
        
        # Self-attention on fused representation
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.hidden_dim * 2,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True,
            dropout=0.1
        )
        
        # Gating mechanism for fusion
        self.gate_v = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        self.gate_t = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.hidden_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Fusion MLP
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim * 2, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, self.fused_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.fused_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Output classifier
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.fused_dim, 512),
            nn.LayerNorm(512),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.3),
            nn.Linear(512, 256),
            nn.LayerNorm(256),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Linear(256, 13)
        )
        
        # Layer norms
        self.norm_v = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        self.norm_t = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim)
        self.norm_fused = nn.LayerNorm(self.hidden_dim * 2)
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.size(0)
        
        # visual: [B, 256, 1024] -> project each token
        v_proj = self.visual_proj(visual)  # [B, 256, hidden]
        
        # Pool visual from 256 to 77 tokens by transposing and linear transform
        v_pooled = v_proj.transpose(1, 2)  # [B, hidden, 256]
        v_pooled = self.visual_pool(v_pooled)  # [B, hidden, 77]
        v_pooled = v_pooled.transpose(1, 2)  # [B, 77, hidden]
        v_pooled = self.norm_v(v_pooled)
        
        # text: [B, 77, 768]
        t_proj = self.text_proj(text)  # [B, 77, hidden]
        t_proj = self.norm_t(t_proj)
        
        # Cross-modal attention: visual features attend to text
        v_attended, _ = self.cross_attn_v2t(
            query=v_pooled, key=t_proj, value=t_proj
        )  # [B, 77, hidden]
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text features attend to visual
        t_attended, _ = self.cross_attn_t2v(
            query=t_proj, key=v_pooled, value=v_pooled
        )  # [B, 77, hidden]
        
        # Concatenate attended features
        fused_seq = torch.cat([v_attended, t_attended], dim=-1)  # [B, 77, hidden*2]
        fused_seq = self.norm_fused(fused_seq)
        
        # Self-attention on sequence
        fused_seq, _ = self.self_attn(fused_seq, fused_seq, fused_seq)
        
        # Global average pooling over sequence
        fused_global = fused_seq.mean(dim=1)  # [B, hidden*2]
        
        # Split for gating
        v_part = fused_global[:, :self.hidden_dim]
        t_part = fused_global[:, self.hidden_dim:]
        
        # Compute gates
        gate_v = self.gate_v(fused_global)
        gate_t = self.gate_t(fused_global)
        
        # Apply gates and combine
        gated = torch.cat([
            v_part * gate_v,
            t_part * gate_t
        ], dim=-1)  # [B, hidden*2]
        
        # Final fusion
        fused = self.fusion_mlp(gated)  # [B, fused_dim]
        
        # Classify
        output = self.classifier(fused)  # [B, 13]
        
        return output

class AutoFusionLayer(nn.Module):

        self.text_seq_len = 77
        self.text_dim = 768

        self.common_dim = 512

        self.visual_proj = nn.Sequential(

        )

        self.text_proj = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.text_dim, self.common_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim),
            nn.GELU(),
        )
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text queries visual
        self.cross_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.common_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True,
            dropout=0.1
        )
        
        # Self-attention for fused features
        self.self_attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(
            embed_dim=self.common_dim,
            num_heads=8,
            batch_first=True,
            dropout=0.1
        )
        
        # Gating mechanism for feature fusion
        self.gate_visual = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim * 2, self.common_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        self.gate_text = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim * 2, self.common_dim),
            nn.Sigmoid()
        )
        
        # Fusion MLP
        self.fusion_mlp = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(self.common_dim * 3, 1024),
            nn.LayerNorm(1024),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
            nn.Linear(1024, 512),
            nn.LayerNorm(512),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.2),
        )
        
        # Output head
        self.output_head = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(512, 256),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(256, 13)
        )
        
        # Layer norms
        self.norm1 = nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim)
        self.norm2 = nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim)
        self.norm3 = nn.LayerNorm(self.common_dim)
        
    def forward(self, visual, text):
        B = visual.shape[0]
        
        # Visual: [B, 256, 1024] -> pool spatially then project
        # Use mean pooling over sequence first, then project
        visual_pooled = visual.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 1024]
        visual_feat = self.visual_proj(visual_pooled)  # [B, 512]
        visual_feat = visual_feat.unsqueeze(1).expand(-1, self.text_seq_len, -1)  # [B, 77, 512]
        
        # Text: [B, 77, 768] -> project
        text_feat = self.text_proj(text)  # [B, 77, 512]
        
        # Cross-modal attention: text attends to visual context
        # Create query from text, key/value from visual
        attn_out, _ = self.cross_attn(
            query=text_feat,
            key=visual_feat,
            value=visual_feat
        )  # [B, 77, 512]
        attn_out = self.norm1(attn_out + text_feat)  # residual
        
        # Self-attention on attended features
        self_out, _ = self.self_attn(attn_out, attn_out, attn_out)
        attn_out = self.norm2(self_out + attn_out)
        
        # Global pooling of attended features
        cross_feat = attn_out.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Also get pooled visual and text features
        visual_global = visual.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 1024]
        visual_global = self.visual_proj(visual_global)  # [B, 512]
        
        text_global = text.mean(dim=1)  # [B, 768]
        text_global = self.text_proj(text_global)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Gated fusion
        concat_for_gate = torch.cat([visual_global, text_global], dim=-1)  # [B, 1024]
        gate_v = self.gate_visual(concat_for_gate)  # [B, 512]
        gate_t = self.gate_text(concat_for_gate)  # [B, 512]
        
        gated_visual = visual_global * gate_v
        gated_text = text_global * gate_t
        
        # Combine all features
        combined = torch.cat([
            gated_visual,  # [B, 512]
            gated_text,    # [B, 512]
            cross_feat     # [B, 512]
        ], dim=-1)  # [B, 1536]
        
        # Fusion and output
        fused = self.fusion_mlp(combined)  # [B, 512]
        output = self.output_head(fused)  # [B, 13]
        
        return output

        )

        ], dim=-1)  # [B, 512*3]

        fused = self.fusion_mlp(combined)  # [B, 512]
        
        # Final classification
        output = self.classifier(fused)  # [B, 13]
        
        return output
